records.descriptionEn: A major woodcut work depicting rural negotiation and social transformation during wartime China.
records.descriptionCn: 這是古元延安時期的重要木刻作品，描繪戰時中國鄉村社會變遷中的減租場景。
records.notes: Updated with content-matched master image on 2026-05-28.

records.descriptionEn: A work associated with land reform and the visual documentation of social change in northern China.
records.descriptionCn: 這件作品與土地改革相關，記錄了中國北方社會變遷中的重要歷史場景。
records.notes: Also translated as Burning Land Deeds

records.descriptionEn: One of Gu Yuan’s significant works from the late 1940s, reflecting collective action and social experience during a period of transition.
records.descriptionCn: 古元20世紀40年代後期的重要作品之一，表現社會轉型時期的集體行動與歷史經驗。

records.descriptionEn: A woodcut work reflecting legal, social, and everyday life issues in rural society during the Yan’an period.
records.descriptionCn: 這件木刻作品反映延安時期鄉村社會中的法律、家庭與日常生活議題。

records.descriptionEn: A work depicting the relationship between soldiers, families, and village communities during wartime.
records.descriptionCn: 作品描繪戰時環境中士兵、家庭與鄉村社群之間的關系。

records.descriptionEn: An early woodcut showing Gu Yuan’s close observation of rural labor and everyday movement.
records.descriptionCn: 早期木刻作品之一，體現古元對鄉村勞動與日常生活動態的觀察。
records.notes: Updated with content-matched master image on 2026-05-28. Earlier sheet year should be verified against catalogue records.

records.descriptionEn: A work created from Gu Yuan’s rural experience in Nianzhuang, focusing on animals, labor, and village life.
records.descriptionCn: 作品來自古元在碾莊鄉的農村經驗，關注牲畜、勞動與鄉村生活。

records.descriptionEn: A rural herding scene with livestock and a village shelter; exact catalogue title should be confirmed.
records.descriptionCn: 描繪牧群、鄉村棚舍與農村生活的木刻場景；確切圖錄題名待確認。
records.notes: Descriptive content match updated on 2026-05-28. Source filename used Niu Tu, but visible image shows a rural herding/livestock scene; exact catalogue title to confirm.

records.descriptionEn: A work connected to rural labor and the everyday rhythms of village life.
records.descriptionCn: 作品與鄉村勞動及村莊日常生活節奏相關。
records.notes: Updated with content-matched master image on 2026-05-28.

records.descriptionEn: A post-1949 work connected to new visual forms and public art in early People’s Republic China.
records.descriptionCn: 這是新中國初期與公共視覺藝術及新年畫形式相關的作品。

records.descriptionEn: A lyrical work showing Gu Yuan’s interest in landscape, agricultural life, and visual atmosphere.
records.descriptionCn: 這件作品具有抒情特征，體現古元對風景、農業生活與視覺氛圍的關注。

records.descriptionEn: A representative color woodcut reflecting Gu Yuan’s mature interest in landscape, composition, and poetic visual language.
records.descriptionCn: 這是一件具有代表性的套色木刻，體現古元成熟時期對風景、構圖與詩性視覺語言的探索。

records.titleEn: Liu Zhidan and the Red Guards
records.descriptionEn: A historical-theme work connected to collective memory and revolutionary-era visual culture.
records.descriptionCn: 這是一件歷史題材作品，與集體記憶和革命時期視覺文化相關。

records.descriptionEn: A representative work often associated with Gu Yuan’s historical and cultural visual memory.
records.descriptionCn: 這件代表作品常與古元的歷史記憶與文化視覺表達聯系在一起。

records.descriptionEn: A late work dedicated to Gu Yuan’s hometown, reflecting memory, landscape, and return.
records.descriptionCn: 古元晚年獻給故鄉的重要作品，體現記憶、風景與回歸主題。

records.descriptionEn: A woodcut portrait based on the literary figure Xianglin Sao, reflecting Gu Yuan’s interest in psychological expression and social realism.
records.descriptionCn: 根據文學人物“祥林嫂”創作的木刻肖像，體現古元對人物心理與現實主義表達的關注。
records.notes: Updated with content-matched master image on 2026-05-28.

records.descriptionEn: An early expressive portrait study using strong black-and-white contrast and simplified composition.
records.descriptionCn: 早期表現性人物木刻習作，以強烈黑白對比與簡化構圖形成視覺張力。

records.titleEn: Japanese Agents Forcing Villagers to Join Puppet Army
records.titleCn: 奪取私人物品參加偽軍
records.descriptionEn: Early anti-war woodcut depicting forced participation under wartime occupation.
records.descriptionCn: 反映戰爭時期強迫民眾參與偽軍的早期木刻作品。

records.descriptionEn: A wartime woodcut related to civilian resistance and conflict during Japanese occupation.
records.descriptionCn: 與戰爭時期民眾反抗與衝突相關的木刻作品。

records.descriptionEn: A socially engaged woodcut focused on labor, agriculture, and wartime rural life.
records.descriptionCn: 關注勞動、農業與戰時鄉村生活的社會性木刻作品。

records.descriptionEn: A dramatic wartime scene reflecting violence and civilian suffering.
records.descriptionCn: 描繪戰爭暴力與平民苦難的戲劇性場景。

records.descriptionEn: A woodcut focusing on survival, labor, and displacement during wartime.
records.descriptionCn: 聚焦戰爭時期生存、勞動與流離失所經驗的木刻作品。

records.descriptionEn: A wartime woodcut capturing displacement and the instability of rural society.
records.descriptionCn: 反映戰爭時期鄉村社會動蕩與流亡經驗的木刻作品。

records.titleCn: 八一三日寇開始進攻上海
records.descriptionEn: A historical wartime print referencing the Japanese attack on Shanghai.
records.descriptionCn: 以日軍進攻上海為主題的歷史性戰時木刻作品。

records.descriptionEn: A small-format folk-inspired print combining decorative symbolism and simplified carving language.
records.descriptionCn: 一件融合民間裝飾性語言與簡化刀法的小幅木刻作品。

records.descriptionEn: A woodcut ex libris reflecting Gu Yuan’s interest in print culture and graphic symbolism.
records.descriptionCn: 體現古元對印刷文化與圖像符號興趣的藏書票作品。

records.descriptionEn: A personal ex libris using animal imagery and simplified folk-inspired composition.
records.descriptionCn: 使用動物圖像與民間化構圖的個人藏書票作品。

records.descriptionEn: A large industrial-themed woodcut documenting steel production, reconstruction, and the scale of modern industry in postwar China.
records.descriptionCn: 大型工業題材木刻，描繪戰後中國鋼鐵生產、重建與現代工業規模。
records.notes: Updated from uploaded master image and source filename on 2026-05-28; catalogue title should still be verified.

records.descriptionEn: A reflective landscape work revisiting Yan’an through memory and visual atmosphere.
records.descriptionCn: 通過風景與視覺氛圍重新回望延安記憶的作品。
records.notes: Updated with content-matched master image on 2026-05-28.

records.descriptionEn: One of Gu Yuan’s most recognized works, depicting collective movement and wartime crossing under dramatic visual contrast.
records.descriptionCn: 古元最具代表性的作品之一，以強烈視覺對比表現戰爭中的集體行動與渡河場景。

records.descriptionEn: A simplified rural-life image reflecting labor and agricultural rhythms through folk-inspired composition.
records.descriptionCn: 以民間化構圖描繪鄉村勞動與農業生活節奏的作品。

records.descriptionEn: A graphic work related to literacy and public education movements during wartime China.
records.descriptionCn: 與戰時識字運動和公共教育相關的圖像作品。

records.descriptionEn: A woodcut depicting rural cooperative organization through simplified folk-inspired imagery.
records.descriptionCn: 通過民間化圖像表現鄉村合作社組織的木刻作品。

records.descriptionEn: A late-period landscape woodcut depicting trees reflected in water and a quiet seasonal atmosphere.
records.descriptionCn: 古元晚期風景木刻，描繪水面倒影、林木與初春的靜謐氣息。
records.notes: Added from uploaded master image on 2026-05-28.

records.descriptionEn: An early woodcut depicting a winter learning scene; exact catalogue details should be verified.
records.descriptionCn: 早期木刻作品，描繪冬季學習場景；確切圖錄資料待確認。
records.notes: To be confirmed. Added from uploaded image on 2026-05-28.

records.titleEn: The Biblical Era Has Passed, No. 3
records.descriptionEn: A woodcut showing a church setting and a reader; title is transcribed from the visible inscription and should be verified against catalogue records.
records.descriptionCn: 描繪教堂場景與閱讀人物的木刻作品；題名依畫面題字轉錄，仍待圖錄資料校訂。
records.notes: Title transcribed from visible inscription as 聖經時代過去（三）; catalogue title and series details to confirm.

records.titleCn: 保護咱們老百姓自己的軍隊（彩色版）
records.descriptionEn: A wartime folk-style image depicting civilian support for the people’s army; exact catalogue title and version details should be confirmed.
records.descriptionCn: 戰時民間圖像風格作品，描繪民眾支援軍隊的場景；確切圖錄題名與版本資料待確認。
records.notes: To be confirmed. Color version added from uploaded image on 2026-05-28.

records.titleCn: 保護咱們老百姓自己的軍隊（黑白版）
records.descriptionEn: A black-and-white version of a wartime folk-style image depicting civilian support for the people’s army; exact catalogue title and version details should be confirmed.
records.descriptionCn: 戰時民間圖像風格作品的黑白版本，描繪民眾支援軍隊的場景；確切圖錄題名與版本資料待確認。
records.notes: To be confirmed. Black-and-white version added from uploaded image on 2026-05-28.

records.descriptionEn: A winter village scene with gathered figures, open snow ground, and rural dwellings; exact catalogue title and date should be confirmed.
records.descriptionCn: 描繪冬日村莊、雪地人物與鄉村居住環境的木刻場景；確切題名與年份待確認。
records.notes: Descriptive content match updated on 2026-05-28. Earlier label Winter School Scene was not verified by visible inscription.
